title: FG_DestType Property
description:
This property sets the method to specify a destination point of the trajectory.

When specifying RobotPoint, set the destination point on by point.

When specifying Relative, set a relative distance (e.g. 10mm from the start point to X direction).

Value	Description

RobotPoint	Set a destination point by point.

Relative	Set a destination point by relative distance.

Default:  False

See Also: DestTypet Property

DestPoint Property
see_also:
Applies To

FollowMove Object, PressMove Object
